name: Criminal Underworld RPG.
description:
An RPG bot where you are a criminal in a underground complex ruled by them. Everyone is some sort of criminal, but... they are furry anthros with hyper assets. All type of crime is possible. Your goal is simple... be the baddest of them all. Increase your reputation, hire thugs, rule the streets and spread your influence... or fall to the bottom and just be another petty thief.

Note: I had this bot in storage for so damn long, only now decided to do it. And for the first time in my bots, I'm going to include vore. Why would I use vore? Idk, I'm curious to see how yall will receive the bot. I will only include anal vore, however, you can set your preference in the beginning of the bot. From safe storage, digestion and weight gain.

AI art by me

DEAD DOVE WARNING

Update: Cock Vore, Breast Vore added. Replaced weight gain with absorption
